item.title: U.S. Senate returns July 13 with CLARITY Act facing a final three-week window before August adjournment
Six U.S. agencies must finalize GENIUS Act stablecoin rules by July 18 statutory deadline
SEC adds three crypto rules to July 2026 regulatory agenda covering offerings, broker-dealers, and market structure
Circle receives OCC approval for national trust bank charter to custody USDC reserves under federal supervision
SEC and CFTC jointly classify 16 crypto assets as digital commodities in landmark interpretive release
EU unlicensed crypto firms face shutdown as MiCA transition period expires, industry warns of market consolidation
UK FCA finalizes comprehensive crypto regime enabling global trading with full compliance requirements
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs record $221.7M daily inflow, ending a 10-day consecutive outflow streak
Nasdaq files proposed rule change to enable in-kind Bitcoin redemptions for BlackRock's $45B IBIT ETF
Coinbase launches U.S. institutional crypto lending platform structured under Regulation D exemption
SEC's Regulation Crypto proposal would allow crypto startups to raise up to $75M under a temporary safe harbor
FDIC confirms stablecoin token holders are ineligible for deposit insurance under GENIUS Act framework
Hyundai becomes first major South Korean conglomerate to implement internal stablecoin transfers
White-hat researchers disclosed Aptos blockchain flaw placing up to $70B in digital assets at systemic risk
